class_name: Cosmetic, Device, Polymer or Injectable Technology
description: Polymer, dermal-filler-type product, cosmetic injectable, device-led presentation or product whose performance depends on rheology, crosslinking or delivery-device characteristics.
mandatory_evidence: Complete composition, polymer identity and concentration
Rheology, particle size and physical-performance specifications
Device, syringe, needle or delivery-system specifications
Sterility, endotoxin, visible and subvisible particulate evidence
automatic_rejection: Device or cosmetic status represented as drug approval
No sterility or biocompatibility evidence for injectable presentation
